narrative:
Somerford Township has 2,439 registered voters, with 47.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.3 percentage points.
